_catalog_notes.scope: Huawei public phone models; tablets, watches, PCs and accessories excluded. Honor models are included only as Huawei-era Honor public models.
_catalog_notes.variant_policy: RAM/storage combinations only; no country, carrier, model-number or SKU duplication.
_catalog_notes.image_policy: GSMArena fdn2 bigpic-style URLs only. Some image URLs are exact from accessible GSMArena-derived index snippets; some newer/legacy ones are generated GSMArena candidate URLs and are listed in the report for verification.
